title: Bridge Essay: A narrative synthesis of research with 5-MeO-DMT.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** (Phase 15) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Liberation/Enlightenment to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Anarrative synthesis of research with 5-MeO-DMT.** — J Psychopharmacol. PMID: 34666554. DOI: 10.1177/02698811211050543. 5-Methoxy-N,N-dimethyltryptamine (5-MeO-DMT) is anaturally occurring, short-acting psychedelic tryptamine, produced by avariety of plant and animal species. Plants containing 5-MeO-DMT have been used throughout history for ritual and spiritual purposes. The aim of this article is to review the available literature about 5-MeO-DMT and inform subsequent clinical development. We searched PubMed database for articles about 5-MeO-DMT.
